title: Top young orators shine during speech contest
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The George, Beaufort West,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The George, Beaufort West, and Bartolomeu Dias Museums jointly hosted the Regional Museum Speech Contest for high schools at the CP Nel Museum in Oudtshoorn on 29 August.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The George, Beaufort West, and Bartolomeu Dias Museums jointly hosted the Regional Museum Speech Contest for high schools at the CP Nel Museum in Oudtshoorn on 29 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The contest sought top young orators from the Southern Cape and Karoo to represent their museums at the Provincial Contest on 24 October at the Montagu Museum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each participating museum was represented by its top five speakers, who delivered compelling and eloquent speeches. The adjudicators faced a formidable challenge in selecting the winners due to the exceptional quality of the presentations. After thorough deliberation, the panel selected the top three speakers, along with two reserves, to advance to the provincial competition.","html":"Each participating museum was represented by its top five speakers, who delivered compelling and eloquent speeches. The adjudicators faced a formidable challenge in selecting the winners due to the exceptional quality of the presentations. After thorough deliberation, the panel selected the top three speakers, along with two reserves, to advance to the provincial competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Results:","html":"Results:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"First: Jonea Pretorius Curro Mossel Bay","html":"First: Jonea Pretorius Curro Mossel Bay"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Second: Linothando Theoline Hlekiso Hillcrest Secondary","html":"Second: Linothando Theoline Hlekiso Hillcrest Secondary"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Third: Grayton Williams Beaufort West","html":"Third: Grayton Williams Beaufort West"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Secondary Schools:","html":"Secondary Schools:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The two reserve speakers were:","html":"The two reserve speakers were:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fourth place: Misokuhle Vulindlela Mandlenkosi Secondary","html":"Fourth place: Misokuhle Vulindlela Mandlenkosi Secondary"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fifth place: Busimi Moko Heatherlands High","html":"Fifth place: Busimi Moko Heatherlands High"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This museum's initiative provides learners with the opportunity to develop and showcase their skills in research and public speaking.","html":"This museum's initiative provides learners with the opportunity to develop and showcase their skills in research and public speaking."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
